ground_truth.title: Digital Marketing Pricing Data: Agency rates comparison for all 50 states to help you optimize your marketing budget
ground_truth.author: Daniel Burstein
ground_truth.main_content: This article presents never-before-published digital marketing pricing data from 6,808 American digital marketing agencies that DesignRush provided exclusivity to MarketingSherpa. The national average hourly rate for digital marketing agencies is $82.66, with a median of $84.40. Delaware tops the list with an average hourly rate of $132.04, followed by Nevada at $107.47. The most affordable states are Alaska at $14.55 per hour, Wyoming at $43.88, and Montana at $45.57. The article includes expert commentary on why certain states have higher or lower rates, tips for finding cost-effective digital marketing services domestically, and discussion of various agency pricing models beyond hourly rates including markup on media buying, pay-for-performance, and fixed-fee arrangements.
with: Setting the right hourly rate can make or break your agency's bottom line.
The national average hourly rate for digital marketing agencies is $82.66.
Delaware tops the list with an average hourly rate of $132.04.
Alaska was the least expensive state at a rock-bottom $14.55 per hour.
DesignRush provided exclusivity to MarketingSherpa for data from 6,808 American digital marketing agencies.
